    token=None,

    client_id=''256051421326-bhku5ma0s61fdcao3r6uuhq0s9jajln6.apps.googleusercontent.com'',
    client_secret=''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'',
    scopes=[''https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets'']
\)
creds.refresh\(Request\(\)\)
print\(''Access token obtained successfully''\)

sheets = build\(''sheets'', ''v4'', credentials=creds\)
result = sheets.spreadsheets\(\).values\(\).get\(
    spreadsheetId=''1SX5r2yJD7RpeHe6MhrE--vN3O6X1ipEwx27S5PvWTqk'',
    range=""''Call Leads March 2026''!A1:K1""
\).execute\(\)

")

from google.oauth2.credentials import Credentials
from google.auth.transport.requests import Request
from googleapiclient.discovery import build

creds = Credentials\(
    token=None,
    refresh_token=''1//04Nnlxo-MLX8fCgYIARAAGAQSNwF-L9Ir_Uek2gU0fqBpaJJ1MKlwBeMkTgjA0upyem-4XbAJ4KJU4NjKwL3ZrIK09nk_Bgh4Ygc'',
    token_uri=''https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token'',
    client_id=''256051421326-bhku5ma0s61fdcao3r6uuhq0s9jajln6.apps.googleusercontent.com'',
    client_secret=''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'',
    scopes=[''https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets'']
\)
creds.refresh\(Request\(\)\)

sheets = build\(''sheets'', ''v4'', credentials=creds\)
result = sheets.spreadsheets\(\).values\(\).get\(
    spreadsheetId=''1SX5r2yJD7RpeHe6MhrE--vN3O6X1ipEwx27S5PvWTqk'',
    range=""''Call Leads March 2026''!A1:Z1""
\).execute\(\)
headers = result.get\(''values'', [[]]\)[0]
for i, h in enumerate\(headers\):

    print\(f''Column {col_letter}: ""{h}""''\)
")
